message.content:
@startuml
participant FlatFileItemWriter
participant LineAggregator
participant FieldExtractor

FlatFileItemWriter -> LineAggregator : 1 mapping bean to record
LineAggregator -> FieldExtractor : 2 extract bean property and convert to array
FieldExtractor --> LineAggregator : 3 Object[]
LineAggregator --> FlatFileItemWriter : 4 record
@enduml
